name: apsal-studio
description: Build live-action AI photography through five complete APSAL layers, then receive a reusable Prompt/Skill package and generate each shot with Codex built-in image generation—no image API key required.

interface.shortDescription: 确认十三元素，打包 Prompt，再由 Codex 逐张生成
interface.longDescription: APSAL Studio turns one natural-language idea into five text-card layers covering all thirteen protocol roles, recommends reusable DNA, binds real references, automatically exports a documented Prompt/Skill ZIP, and hands each independent shot to Codex built-in image generation without calling an image API or requiring an API key.
defaultPrompt: 创建九张真人摄影主题，确认十三元素并打包全部 Prompt。
设计欢喜但克制的主题，用 Codex 内置能力逐张生成。
检查 Prompt/Skill 使用包，并告诉我如何安装和继续下一张。
